title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 540.260 - Indictment not a true bill, when
text:
540.260.  Indictment not a true bill, when. — When there is not a concurrence of nine grand jurors in finding an indictment, the foreperson shall certify, under his hand, that such an indictment is not a true bill.
(RSMo 1939 § 3927, A.L. 1989 S.B. 127, et al.) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3538; 1919 § 3883; 1909 § 5091
